description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 빛이 찬란한 색의 스펙트럼으로 갈라지며, 부드러운 색수차와 몽환적인 빛의 잔상을 만들어내는 매혹적인 시각적 경험을 선사합니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing display of light passing through a glass prism, splitting into a vibrant spectrum of colors with soft chromatic aberration and ethereal glows.

prompt: Macro photography of a triangular crystal prism, a single beam of pure white light hitting the edge and dispersing into a brilliant, wide rainbow spectrum across a clean white surface, sharp caustic light effects, hyper-realistic glass textures, soft volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic bokeh, subtle chromatic aberration.
